description_long: This factory building is a compact, rectangular structure situated on a flat, open lot. The exterior appears to be constructed from dark, industrial materials, giving it a utilitarian and robust appearance. The building has a low profile with minimal visible architectural ornamentation, emphasizing function over form. There are no large windows or loading dock doors visible, and the roofline is flat without any apparent rooftop machinery or smokestacks. The color palette is predominantly dark, blending with the muted tones of the surrounding ground. The overall design suggests a modern industrial style, suitable for light manufacturing or storage in an urban environment.
description: A small, dark, rectangular factory building with a flat roof and minimal exterior features, set on a plain lot. The structure is utilitarian and industrial in appearance.
description_view_0: From this view, the building appears as a small, dark rectangle centered on a large, flat ground plane, with no visible windows or doors.
description_view_1: This angle shows the building's silhouette more clearly, but still no distinct features such as windows or doors are visible.
description_view_2: The side profile reveals the building's low height and rectangular footprint, with the same dark exterior and no additional details.
description_view_3: This view is similar to view 1, showing the front or rear of the building with a simple, unadorned facade.
